settings.ggLYsXb6I8W_text:
STEP 1 
Purchase a Retinol Intense Reactivating Serum or Retinol Intense Advanced Triple Action Eye Cream between October 7 and November 4.

STEP 2

Try and use it.

STEP 3

Share your experience before Tuesday November 18, 22:59 GMT by leaving a review on the product page of your product. Your review must be honest, genuine, informative and helpful for other KS customers.

STEP 4

Leave your order number in your review! (example: #KS-817356)
STEP 5

Your personal Beta Panthenol Repair Cream code will be sent by November 20. It will be valid until December 31.

STEP 6

Add the Beta Panthenol Repair Cream to your cart on your next KS order and use the code to get it for free.

settings.ggap9Rfg5DI_text: The SOME BY MI Beta Panthenol Repair Cream is an ultra-hydrating powerhouse, restoring moisture and reinforcing skin barriers for soft, plump, balanced skin. It’s amazing when paired with the Retinol Intense Reactivating Serum, creating the perfect duo for radiant glass skin.
